title: Bridge Essay: Inner speech.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Inner speech.**. Wiley Interdiscip Rev Cogn Sci.. PMID: 32949083. DOI: 10.1002/wcs.1544. Inner speech travels under many aliases: the inner voice, verbal thought, thinking in words, internal verbalization, "talking in your head," the "little voice in the head," and so on. It is both afamiliar element of first-person experience and apsychological phenomenon whose complex cognitive components and distributed neural bases are increasingly well understood.
